statement: The closed-form lower-semicontinuity transport theorem supplies the closed lower-envelope identification and transported LSC form facts needed by the augmented nonnegative closed-form limit theorem.

closedLowerEnvelopeIdentificationStatus.label: closed lower-envelope identification
closedLowerEnvelopeIdentificationStatus.reason: Imported from the closed-form LSC transport theorem.

closedFormTransportStatus.label: closed-form LSC transport
closedFormTransportStatus.reason: Imported from the closed-form LSC transport theorem.

closedFormLscTransportConsequenceStatus.label: closed-form LSC transport consequence
closedFormLscTransportConsequenceStatus.reason: Together these facts identify the completed lower envelope used by the nonnegative closed-form limit theorem.

proof: Import the closed-form LSC transport theorem.
Extract the transported closed lower-semicontinuity conclusion.
Expose only these consequences to the augmented nonnegative closed-form limit theorem.
